# Authority model

> **Reference** · for integrators · **read when** you need the exact "who may write what"

Who may write what. Write authority is **derived**: a role may write a lane iff it holds the capability that lane's `kind:` requires. The meaning of each capability and the rules around them live in [`lanes.md`](lanes.md) — this page is the projected table of current values.

## Lanes — the zone-kind ↔ capability bijection

Each zone-kind maps 1:1 to exactly one capability (ADR 0091).

| Zone `kind` | Required capability |
|-------------|---------------------|
| `canon` | `author` |
| `workspace` | `keep` |
| `machine` | `converge` |
| `queue` | `propose` |
| `raw` | `ingest` |
## Zones (this manifest)

| Zone | `kind` | Required capability | Purpose |
|------|--------|---------------------|---------|
| `knowledge` | `canon` | `author` | the maintained source of truth about the repo |
| `notebook` | `workspace` | `keep` | the agent's own durable working notes |
| `proposals` | `queue` | `propose` | changes awaiting a human accept |
| `artifacts` | `machine` | `converge` | machine-maintained computed outputs |
| `raw` | `raw` | `ingest` | ingested external source material (write-once) |
## Roles (this manifest)

A role may write a lane iff it holds the capability that lane's kind requires; the last column lists the zone-kinds each role's capabilities authorize.

| Role | Capabilities (`can`) | Writes zone-kinds |
|------|----------------------|-------------------|
| `human` | `author` `propose` `ingest` | `canon` `queue` `raw` |
| `agent` | `propose` `keep` `ingest` | `queue` `raw` `workspace` |
| `automation` | `converge` `ingest` | `machine` `raw` |
